title: carex atrata var. parviflora
intro: Carex atrata var. parviflora, also known as the black sedge, is a type of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Carex atrata var. parviflora include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and protect against infection. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and minor wounds.
